title: kyllinga melanosperma subsp. elata
intro: Kyllinga melanosperma subsp. elata is a perennial aquatic plant species, commonly known as the black grass or black sedge, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kyllinga melanosperma subsp. elata include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
